title: Unisys Innovation Program
description:
Open to candidates from all branches of Engineering, IT/Computer Science, Business, and other related disciplines.

Inter-departmental teams are allowed and encouraged.

------------------------------
THEMES
------------------------------
• Agents Unleashed
• Beyond the Perimeter
• Connected World (IoT)
• Immersive Experiences
• Innovating the Quantum Frontier
• Innovation Beyond Boundaries

------------------------------
STEPS TO FOLLOW
------------------------------
1. After registration, students must form teams with no more than four members and a maximum of two guides from their respective colleges.

2. Each team must submit their abstract through the UTFI website.

3. A group of subject-matter experts from Unisys will review each abstract and decide which ideas will progress.

4. Every selected team will be assigned a Unisys mentor who will guide them in transforming their ideas into reality.

5. A panel of experts will assess each team’s progress throughout the program and select six finalists to present live demos.

------------------------------
IMPORTANT LINKS
------------------------------
Know More About Competition:
https://www.unisys.com/unisys-innovation-program/

Register Here:
https://utfi.co.in/local/registration/registration.php

Submit Ideas (after registration):
https://utfi.co.in/

Registration/Idea Submission Count Sheet:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1viMa9EK6FM_yEQ_8yI2PZRS9ACQX6ETJCNHbr11G3WE/edit?usp=drivesdk

title: STACK SPRINT 1.0 (Software Prototype Edition)
location: Open Area, Ground Floor, Block D3
description:
Organised by Cloud Stack Club.

Got a powerful software idea? This is your moment to turn it into a working prototype and showcase it in front of innovators, mentors, and industry leaders.

------------------------------
COMPETITION AREAS
------------------------------
• Cloud-Native Applications.
• DevOps & Deployment Solutions.
• AI/ML Innovations.
• Full-Stack & Scalable Software Systems.

------------------------------
EVENT DETAILS
------------------------------
• Dates: 24th–26th February 2026.
• Time: 10:00 A.M. onwards.
• Venue: Open Area, Ground Floor, Block D3.
• Open to all students (Teams encouraged).

------------------------------
WHY YOU SHOULDN'T MISS THIS
------------------------------
• Winners will receive Trophies & Certificates.
• Exclusive Internship Opportunities in Startups.
• Direct Selection to participate in an International AWS Hackathon.
• Opportunity to receive heavy funding support for your project.

This isn’t just a competition — it’s your gateway to real-world exposure, industry connections, and career-defining opportunities.

Build something impactful.
Get recognized.
Get funded.
Make your resume stronger than ever.

------------------------------
REGISTRATION LINK
------------------------------
https://forms.gle/FKz4EZWriGRMzK5y9

------------------------------
CONTACT FOR QUERIES
------------------------------
• Hirday Rana – 98153 99225.
• Aayush Kumar – 9700 44460.
